name: Process Video
description: Extracts fluorescence traces from a calcium-imaging video.
author: Daniel Zanelli

parameters.name: input_roi
parameters.label: ROI file
parameters.description: ZIP file with the regions of interest (.zip, generated by ImageJ/FIJI or the Select ROIs plugin)

parameters.name: metric_max
parameters.label: Metric: Maximum
parameters.description: Computes the maximum pixel value within each ROI per frame

parameters.name: metric_mean
parameters.label: Metric: Mean
parameters.description: Computes the mean pixel value within each ROI per frame

parameters.name: metric_std
parameters.label: Metric: Standard deviation
parameters.description: Computes the standard deviation of pixels within each ROI per frame

parameters.name: metric_int
parameters.label: Metric: Integral
parameters.description: Computes the sum (integral) of pixels within each ROI per frame

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.label: Output folder
parameters.description: Folder where the results will be saved

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.label: Normalize signals
parameters.description: Applies Z-score normalization to the extracted traces

outputs.output_csv: Path to the CSV file with the extracted fluorescence traces
